label: Hediff stage
description: One severity-keyed state of a HediffDef that becomes active when severity meets or exceeds minSeverity.

minSeverity.label: Min severity
minSeverity.description: Minimum severity at which this stage becomes active. Stages are selected by finding the highest minSeverity not exceeding current severity.

label.label: Label
label.description: Display name for this stage shown in the health tab and tooltips. Overrides the hediff label while this stage is active.

overrideLabel.label: Override label
overrideLabel.description: If set, fully replaces the hediff label in all UI contexts while this stage is active.

becomeVisible.label: Become visible
becomeVisible.description: If true, the hediff becomes visible in the health tab when this stage is reached.

lifeThreatening.label: Life threatening
lifeThreatening.description: If true, this stage is considered life-threatening and raises medical urgency.

tale.label: Tale
tale.description: TaleDef recorded when the pawn first enters this stage.

vomitMtbDays.label: Vomit MTB (days)
vomitMtbDays.description: Mean time in days between vomiting events while in this stage. Negative means no vomiting.

deathMtbDays.label: Death MTB (days)
deathMtbDays.description: Mean time in days between random death rolls while in this stage. Negative disables random death.

mtbDeathDestroysBrain.label: MTB death destroys brain
mtbDeathDestroysBrain.description: If true, a random death triggered by deathMtbDays destroys the brain, preventing resurrection.

painFactor.label: Pain factor
painFactor.description: Multiplier applied to pain produced by this hediff while in this stage.

painOffset.label: Pain offset
painOffset.description: Flat amount added to pawn pain while in this stage.

totalBleedFactor.label: Total bleed factor
totalBleedFactor.description: Multiplier applied to the pawn's total bleed rate while in this stage.

naturalHealingFactor.label: Natural healing factor
naturalHealingFactor.description: Multiplier applied to natural healing rate while in this stage. -1 means no override.

regeneration.label: Regeneration
regeneration.description: HP regenerated per day on the affected body part. -1 means no regeneration.

showRegenerationStat.label: Show regeneration stat
showRegenerationStat.description: If true, displays the regeneration amount as a visible stat in the health tab.

forgetMemoryThoughtMtbDays.label: Forget memory thought MTB (days)
forgetMemoryThoughtMtbDays.description: Mean time in days between forgetting a random memory thought while in this stage. Negative disables.

pctConditionalThoughtsNullified.label: Pct conditional thoughts nullified
pctConditionalThoughtsNullified.description: Fraction (0–1) of conditional thoughts that are nullified while in this stage.

pctAllThoughtNullification.label: Pct all thought nullification
pctAllThoughtNullification.description: Fraction (0–1) of all thoughts that are nullified while in this stage.

opinionOfOthersFactor.label: Opinion of others factor
opinionOfOthersFactor.description: Multiplier applied to this pawn's opinion of all other pawns while in this stage.

fertilityFactor.label: Fertility factor
fertilityFactor.description: Multiplier applied to pawn fertility while in this stage.

hungerRateFactor.label: Hunger rate factor
hungerRateFactor.description: Multiplier applied to the pawn's hunger rate while in this stage.

hungerRateFactorOffset.label: Hunger rate factor offset
hungerRateFactorOffset.description: Flat amount added to the hunger rate factor while in this stage.

restFallFactor.label: Rest fall factor
restFallFactor.description: Multiplier applied to how quickly the pawn's rest need falls while in this stage.

restFallFactorOffset.label: Rest fall factor offset
restFallFactorOffset.description: Flat amount added to the rest fall factor while in this stage.

socialFightChanceFactor.label: Social fight chance factor
socialFightChanceFactor.description: Multiplier applied to the probability of starting a social fight while in this stage.

foodPoisoningChanceFactor.label: Food poisoning chance factor
foodPoisoningChanceFactor.description: Multiplier applied to the chance of food poisoning while in this stage.

mentalBreakMtbDays.label: Mental break MTB (days)
mentalBreakMtbDays.description: Mean time in days between random mental break triggers while in this stage. Negative disables.

mentalBreakExplanation.label: Mental break explanation
mentalBreakExplanation.description: Text displayed in the mental break alert explaining why this hediff stage triggered the break.

blocksMentalBreaks.label: Blocks mental breaks
blocksMentalBreaks.description: If true, the pawn cannot have a mental break while in this stage.

blocksInspirations.label: Blocks inspirations
blocksInspirations.description: If true, the pawn cannot gain inspirations while in this stage.

overrideMoodBase.label: Override mood base
overrideMoodBase.description: If set, replaces the pawn's base mood value while in this stage.

severityGainFactor.label: Severity gain factor
severityGainFactor.description: Multiplier applied to any severity gain while in this stage.

removeRoamMtb.label: Remove roam MTB
removeRoamMtb.description: If true, roaming world pawns at this stage have their hediff removed over time.

preventVacuumBurns.label: Prevent vacuum burns
preventVacuumBurns.description: If true, prevents the pawn from receiving vacuum burn injuries while in this stage.

allowedMentalBreakIntensities.label: Allowed mental break intensities
allowedMentalBreakIntensities.description: Mental break intensity levels that can be triggered while in this stage. If empty, all intensities are allowed.

makeImmuneTo.label: Make immune to
makeImmuneTo.description: HediffDefs that the pawn becomes immune to while in this stage.

capMods.label: Capacity modifiers
capMods.description: Pawn capacity modifications applied while in this stage.

hediffGivers.label: Hediff givers
hediffGivers.description: Givers that can apply secondary hediffs while the pawn is in this stage.

mentalStateGivers.label: Mental state givers
mentalStateGivers.description: Givers that can trigger mental states while the pawn is in this stage.

statOffsets.label: Stat offsets
statOffsets.description: Flat values added to named stats while in this stage.

statFactors.label: Stat factors
statFactors.description: Multipliers applied to named stats while in this stage.

statOffsetsBySeverity.label: Stat offsets by severity
statOffsetsBySeverity.description: Severity-scaled stat offsets. Each entry pairs a stat with a curve mapping severity to offset value.

statFactorsBySeverity.label: Stat factors by severity
statFactorsBySeverity.description: Severity-scaled stat factors. Each entry pairs a stat with a curve mapping severity to factor value.

damageFactors.label: Damage factors
damageFactors.description: Multipliers applied to incoming damage of specific types while in this stage.

enablesNeeds.label: Enables needs
enablesNeeds.description: NeedDefs that are unlocked for the pawn while in this stage.

disablesNeeds.label: Disables needs
disablesNeeds.description: NeedDefs that are suppressed for the pawn while in this stage.

multiplyStatChangesBySeverity.label: Multiply stat changes by severity
multiplyStatChangesBySeverity.description: If true, all stat offsets and factors are scaled proportionally by current severity.

statOffsetEffectMultiplier.label: Stat offset effect multiplier
statOffsetEffectMultiplier.description: StatDef whose value multiplies the effect of all stat offsets in this stage.

statFactorEffectMultiplier.label: Stat factor effect multiplier
statFactorEffectMultiplier.description: StatDef whose value multiplies the effect of all stat factors in this stage.

capacityFactorEffectMultiplier.label: Capacity factor effect multiplier
capacityFactorEffectMultiplier.description: StatDef whose value multiplies the effect of all capacity modifiers in this stage.

disabledWorkTags.label: Disabled work tags
disabledWorkTags.description: Work tags disabled for the pawn while in this stage. Comma-separated flags.

overrideTooltip.label: Override tooltip
overrideTooltip.description: If set, completely replaces the default stage tooltip.

extraTooltip.label: Extra tooltip
extraTooltip.description: Extra text appended to the stage tooltip.

blocksSleeping.label: Blocks sleeping
blocksSleeping.description: If true, the pawn cannot sleep while in this stage.

partEfficiencyOffset.label: Part efficiency offset
partEfficiencyOffset.description: Flat amount added to the efficiency of the affected body part while in this stage.

partIgnoreMissingHP.label: Part ignore missing HP
partIgnoreMissingHP.description: If true, the affected body part ignores HP loss for efficiency calculations while in this stage.

destroyPart.label: Destroy part
destroyPart.description: If true, the affected body part is destroyed when this stage is reached.
